prestazioni: Replace the stock 12H-T (4.0L inline-6 turbo-diesel, 135 PS) with a fully built 1HD-FTE (4.2L inline-6 turbo-diesel, 165 PS) from a Land Cruiser 80/100 series, featuring a forged crankshaft, Carrillo connecting rods, and Mahle Motorsport pistons for 220 PS at 3,600 RPM with a 1.5 bar boost limit using a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Borla Pro XS muffler

Install a PWR Performance radiator with dual 12-inch SPAL fans, a Mishimoto aluminum intercooler, and a custom 3-core oil cooler to manage the increased thermal load from the 1HD-FTE conversion and forced induction

Upgrade the stock H55F 5-speed manual transmission to a reinforced H151F 5-speed from a Land Cruiser 70 series with a South African Toyota Racing Development (TRD) heavy-duty clutch kit, paired with a 4.88:1 ARB RD90 front and rear differential with 30-spline chromoly axles and a Detroit Locker for extreme off-road durability
estetica: Replace the military-spec flat panels with a custom widebody kit from Australian fabricator TJM, featuring flared fenders, a vented hood, and a rear tub extension to accommodate 37-inch Mickey Thompson Baja Boss M/T tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12 offset)

Install a full external roll cage from Safari 4x4 in Australia, integrated with a custom front bumper from ARB featuring a Warn Zeon 12-S winch, auxiliary light mounts for Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods, and a rear swing-out tire carrier with dual jerry can holders

Apply a military-inspired matte olive drab wrap with 3M 1080 series vinyl, paired with a custom stencil kit from Australian company Stencil Revolution for tactical unit markings, and replace all external lighting with Osram LED military-spec units (blackout mode compatible)
